headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Slide Amid Jerome Powell's Inflation Warning: Analyst Says BTC 'Not Looking Good,' Sees Drop Toward These Levels

headline: Coinbase’s AgentKit Targets AI Transactions While Valuation Stays Stretched
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) has launched AgentKit in partnership with World and Cloudflare. The new toolkit is designed to let AI agents perform verified, human-backed onchain transactions and micropayments. This move extends Coinbase’s role beyond a crypto exchange into AI driven, blockchain based transaction infrastructure. For readers following Coinbase as primarily a trading venue, AgentKit points to a broader ambition around developer tools and onchain services. The company is...
